rows.label: tev013401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Matthew for his thoughts on the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0001
rows.name:
My wife, Alesa, has a boutique in the
commercial district. Apparently she even
gets Ma-non customers coming in sometimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Unfortunately, she gets a little
uneasy around xenos. Or anyone
who looks strange, actually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lately, she's been dreading even opening
her shop. Is it really all that bad?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0004
rows.name:
I mean, the Ma-non pretty much do
whatever you want so long as
there's a pizza involved, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Although free pizza might just
make them visit even more, now
that I think about it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I've gotten pretty used to dealing with
Aganeba. If it looks like he's going to gripe
about something, I just order him a pizza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0009
rows.name:
At this point, I just need to pull
out my comm device and open the delivery
menu to get him to do as I ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0010
rows.name:
So long as I provide pizza, I don't even
need to pay him. It's so convenient![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0020
rows.name:
I just heard from Alesa that you helped
resolve her issue with Ma-non customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I don't think her fear will ever go
away completely, but her attitude
toward the Ma-non is much better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0022
rows.name:
I've been too busy with work
to discuss it with her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013401_MSG0023
rows.name:
But when I see her face after I get home, she
looks a lot less stressed than she used to.
And that's certainly a load off my mind![ST:wait ]
